headline: The new Halide camera app launches with film looks and an upgraded photo editor
summary: The Halide Mark III camera app is now available for iPhone and iPad. It introduces a new film simulation engine with five unique 'Looks'. Users can apply film-like effects instantly as they capture photos.

headline: Facebook launches a ‘Plus’ subscription that gives you extra features
summary: Meta is globally rolling out premium subscriptions for Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp. The company is also testing subscription options for Meta AI. This move brings Meta in line with other tech giants offering paid tiers.

headline: Roids were all the rage at the Enhanced Games
summary: The Enhanced Games in Las Vegas openly permits performance-enhancing drugs for competitors. Swimmer Cody Miller celebrated victory, showcasing the event's unique athletic approach. This controversial competition aims to push human limits beyond traditional sporting rules.

headline: Valve raises Steam Deck prices by more than $200
summary: Valve has significantly increased the price of the Steam Deck, with some models rising over $200. The 512GB OLED model now costs $789, and the 1TB model is $949. Despite the price hike, both models are currently available and in stock.

headline: Save $2,400 Off the Alienware 16X Aurora RTX 5070 Gaming Laptop Loaded With 64GB of RAM and 4TB SSD
summary: Score a massive $2,400 discount on the Alienware 16X Aurora RTX 5070 gaming laptop. This powerful machine comes with 64GB of RAM and a huge 4TB SSD. Enjoy premium build quality and strong gaming performance at a significantly reduced price.

headline: The New 2026 Apple iPad Air with M4 Chip Drops to a New All-Time Low Price in May
summary: The new 2026 Apple iPad Air, powered by the M4 chip, has reached a new all-time low price. Shoppers can save $80 compared to purchasing directly from the Apple Store. This deal offers a significant discount on the latest iPad Air model.

headline: Dragon Quest 12: Beyond Dreams Update
summary: Square Enix announced that Dragon Quest 12 development has been restarted from scratch. The game's new subtitle is 'Beyond Dreams,' replacing the original 'The Flames of Fate.' Fans received a quick look at the long-awaited RPG sequel.

headline: Steam Deck Price Increase Announced by Valve
summary: Valve has announced a substantial price increase for the Steam Deck OLED models. This news comes as the devices are officially back in stock after months of unavailability. Gamers can now purchase the console, albeit at a higher cost.

headline: Burnham and Streeting accuse Blair of ignoring inequality as they hit back at ex-PM
summary: Labour mayor Andy Burnham and former minister Wes Streeting criticized ex-PM Tony Blair. They accused Blair of neglecting inequality in his recent 5,600-word essay. Their comments served as a direct rebuttal to Blair's political analysis.

headline: Safety warning after nine water-related deaths during heatwave
summary: Nine people have tragically died in water-related incidents during the recent heatwave. Charities are issuing urgent warnings, urging the public to take precautions. People are advised to exercise extreme caution when near water.

headline: Trump says US 'not satisfied' with Iran deal yet
summary: President Trump stated the US is not yet satisfied with the terms of the Iran deal. He believes Iran is open to reaching an agreement, but no consensus has been found. Negotiations are ongoing as both sides work towards a resolution.

headline: Family of mum, 30, shot dead outside Sheffield bar pay tribute to 'beautiful soul'
summary: Shanice Brookes, a 30-year-old mother, was fatally shot outside a Sheffield bar. Her family paid tribute to her, describing her as a 'beautiful soul.' Shanice was working for a charity and was studying for a university degree.
